data.title: Rivian Reportedly Struck A 'Secret' Deal With UAW That Also Helped It Secure $6.6 Billion Loan From Department Of Energy
data.description: EV maker Rivian Automotive has reportedly struck a confidential deal with the United Auto Workers (UAW) union.

data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Units Reportedly Found With Cell Dent Issues: EV Giant Starts Replacing Battery Packs
data.description: Tesla has reportedly found some units of Cybertruck with "cell dent" issues and the company has started replacing battery packs of those cars.

data.title: ChatGPT Maker OpenAI Drops o3 Reasoning Model As o1's Successor: Greg Brockman Calls It A 'Breakthrough'
data.description: OpenAI concluded its "12 Days of OpenAI" event by launching the o3 reasoning model, a major upgrade over its predecessor o1, showcasing significant advancements in problem-solving and coding capabilities.

data.title: Qualcomm Bags Win In Chips Licensing Trial Against Arm, But The Battle Is Not Over Yet
data.description: Qualcomm bagged a key win in its legal battle against semiconductor design company Arm Holdings.

data.title: Elon Musk Changes Tone, Applauds Speaker Johnson: 'It Went From A Bill That Weighed Pounds To One That Weighed Ounces'
data.description: Elon Musk praised Speaker Mike Johnson's revised spending package to prevent a government shutdown, calling it a significant improvement, after initially expressing skepticism about the plan.
